Registry / Terms / permanent automatic checking facility (type P)

permanent automatic checking facility (type P)

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #01038 · 21 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 9 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

9 distinct definitions across 21 publications. 5 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).
